financing.title: Financing
financing.description: When banks do not provide loans but you still wish to acquire property

details.brokerage: Real estate and business project brokerage is carried out and coordinated by the founder and CEO of GloReal INVESTMENTS, German Randla — holder of a Level 6 professional certificate No. KKM 219715 and a partner and consultant with over 18 years of experience in the real estate sector. The brokerage fee for sales is 3–4% (2.5% for loyal clients) of the property sale price and is paid by the seller (service client). In rental transactions in Estonia, the brokerage fee is typically paid by the tenant and equals one month’s rent. NB! GloReal INVESTMENTS does not add VAT to residential property brokerage fees. VAT is included in the price.
details.management: We provide daily management and maintenance of your property, including utility management, technical supervision, cleaning, coordination of emergency works, and communication with tenants.
details.renovation: We carry out both minor repair works and large-scale renovation projects. We prepare a work plan, procure materials, and ensure high-quality execution.
details.valuation: Property valuation based on market value, taking into account location, condition, market trends, and statistics of comparable properties. Required for sale, rental, or financing purposes.
details.media: We create professional photo and video materials that highlight the best features of your property. We use drones, wide-angle lenses, and styling when necessary.
details.investment: We advise on investment opportunities, including rental properties, development projects, and commercial real estate. We help create strategies and assess risks.
details.financing: If banks do not provide financing, we offer alternative solutions in cooperation with investors. We assess the property, prepare a financial plan, and find the most suitable solution.

brokerage.content: Real estate and business project brokerage is carried out and coordinated by the founder and CEO of <0>Glo</0><1>Real</1> <2>INVESTMENTS</2>, <4>German </4><5>Randla</5>, holder of a Level 6 professional certificate No. <2>KKM 219715</2> and a partner and consultant with over 18 years of experience in the real estate sector.
The brokerage fee for sales is 3–4% (2.5% for loyal clients) of the property sale price and is paid by the seller (service client).
In rental transactions in Estonia, the brokerage fee is typically paid by the tenant and equals one month’s rent.
<3>NB!</3> <0>Glo</0><1>Real</1> <2>INVESTMENTS</2> <3>does not add VAT to residential property brokerage fees. VAT is included in the price.</3>

brokerage.text: Send your request and we will contact you shortly

management.content: The property management service for owners provided by <0>Glo</0><1>Real</1> <2>INVESTMENTS</2> is a paid management and maintenance service for your property over a specified period, including the following services:

items: Communication with housing and utility service providers
Coordination of property maintenance and repairs
In case of debts: payment schedules, eviction, legal proceedings
Annual management = 100% of one month’s rent per year
10% — if rental value is below 300.- EUR per month

management.text: Send your request and we will contact you shortly

items: Installation of internal walls and partitions
Painting works for walls and ceilings
Tiling works in hallways, bathrooms, and kitchens
Installation of kitchen furniture and appliances

valuation.content: We provide fast and objective expert valuation of your property through our partners.

items: Market value assessment before sale — 50.- EUR
FREE for clients with an exclusive agreement
Valuation of other properties — according to the price list
<0>Glo</0><1>Real</1> <2>INVESTMENTS</2>: <3>-15% off the standard price</3> for properties sold through us
